items.title: Pushing back on AI job loss fears, AWS CEO Matt Garman says Amazon plans to hire 11,000 software engineering interns in 2026, a figure in line with recent years (Ben Shimkus/Business Insider)
items.title_original: Pushing back on AI job loss fears, AWS CEO Matt Garman says Amazon plans to hire 11,000 software engineering interns in 2026, a figure in line with recent years (Ben Shimkus/Business Insider)
items.title_en: Pushing back on AI job loss fears, AWS CEO Matt Garman says Amazon plans to hire 11,000 software engineering interns in 2026, a figure in line with recent years (Ben Shimkus/Business Insider)
items.title_zh: AWS 首席执行官马特·加曼 (Matt Garman) 表示，亚马逊计划在 2026 年雇用 11,000 名软件工程实习生，这一数字与近年来的数据相符（Ben Shimkus/Business Insider），以此打消人工智能失业的担忧。
items.title_bilingual: AWS 首席执行官马特·加曼 (Matt Garman) 表示，亚马逊计划在 2026 年雇用 11,000 名软件工程实习生，这一数字与近年来的数据相符（Ben Shimkus/Business Insider），以此打消人工智能失业的担忧。 / Pushing back on AI job loss fears, AWS CEO Matt Garman says Amazon plans to hire 11,000 software engineering interns in 2026, a figure in line with recent years (Ben Shimkus/Business Insider)

items.title: Some retail traders are training AI agents to buy and sell assets on their behalf, as exchanges like Polymarket and Bybit roll out agent-friendly interfaces (Emily Nicolle/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Some retail traders are training AI agents to buy and sell assets on their behalf, as exchanges like Polymarket and Bybit roll out agent-friendly interfaces (Emily Nicolle/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Some retail traders are training AI agents to buy and sell assets on their behalf, as exchanges like Polymarket and Bybit roll out agent-friendly interfaces (Emily Nicolle/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 随着 Polymarket 和 Bybit 等交易所推出了代理友好界面，一些零售交易者正在培训人工智能代理代表他们买卖资产（Emily Nicolle/Bloomberg）
items.title_bilingual: 随着 Polymarket 和 Bybit 等交易所推出了代理友好界面，一些零售交易者正在培训人工智能代理代表他们买卖资产（Emily Nicolle/Bloomberg） / Some retail traders are training AI agents to buy and sell assets on their behalf, as exchanges like Polymarket and Bybit roll out agent-friendly interfaces (Emily Nicolle/Bloomberg)

items.title: The US, UK, Australia, Canada, and New Zealand publish guidance on orgs' use of agentic AI systems, saying many give AI more access than can be safely monitored (Greg Otto/CyberScoop)
items.title_original: The US, UK, Australia, Canada, and New Zealand publish guidance on orgs' use of agentic AI systems, saying many give AI more access than can be safely monitored (Greg Otto/CyberScoop)
items.title_en: The US, UK, Australia, Canada, and New Zealand publish guidance on orgs' use of agentic AI systems, saying many give AI more access than can be safely monitored (Greg Otto/CyberScoop)
items.title_zh: 美国、英国、澳大利亚、加拿大和新西兰发布了有关组织使用代理人工智能系统的指南，称许多组织给予人工智能的访问权限超出了安全监控的范围（Greg Otto/Cyber​​Scoop）
items.title_bilingual: 美国、英国、澳大利亚、加拿大和新西兰发布了有关组织使用代理人工智能系统的指南，称许多组织给予人工智能的访问权限超出了安全监控的范围（Greg Otto/Cyber​​Scoop） / The US, UK, Australia, Canada, and New Zealand publish guidance on orgs' use of agentic AI systems, saying many give AI more access than can be safely monitored (Greg Otto/CyberScoop)

items.title: The gender gap in AI use may be a matter of visibility more than usage, as data suggests women face more judgment for using AI and are less likely to admit it (Issie Lapowsky/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: The gender gap in AI use may be a matter of visibility more than usage, as data suggests women face more judgment for using AI and are less likely to admit it (Issie Lapowsky/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: The gender gap in AI use may be a matter of visibility more than usage, as data suggests women face more judgment for using AI and are less likely to admit it (Issie Lapowsky/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 人工智能使用中的性别差距可能更多地是可见性问题，而不是使用情况，因为数据表明女性在使用人工智能时面临更多评判，并且不太可能承认这一点（Issie Lapowsky/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 人工智能使用中的性别差距可能更多地是可见性问题，而不是使用情况，因为数据表明女性在使用人工智能时面临更多评判，并且不太可能承认这一点（Issie Lapowsky/彭博社） / The gender gap in AI use may be a matter of visibility more than usage, as data suggests women face more judgment for using AI and are less likely to admit it (Issie Lapowsky/Bloomberg)

items.title: 'Tens of millions of Graviton cores': AWS scores huge coup as Meta 'buys' hundreds of thousands of CPUs and infrastructure, confirming Jeff Bezos' hyperscaler as the essential backbone of the agentic AI Era in a major blow to AMD and Intel ambitions
items.title_original: 'Tens of millions of Graviton cores': AWS scores huge coup as Meta 'buys' hundreds of thousands of CPUs and infrastructure, confirming Jeff Bezos' hyperscaler as the essential backbone of the agentic AI Era in a major blow to AMD and Intel ambitions
items.title_en: 'Tens of millions of Graviton cores': AWS scores huge coup as Meta 'buys' hundreds of thousands of CPUs and infrastructure, confirming Jeff Bezos' hyperscaler as the essential backbone of the agentic AI Era in a major blow to AMD and Intel ambitions
items.title_zh: “数以千万计的 Graviton 核心”：随着 Meta“购买”数十万个 CPU 和基础设施，AWS 取得了巨大的成功，证实了杰夫·贝佐斯的超大规模计算器是代理 AI 时代的重要支柱，这对 AMD 和英特尔的野心造成了重大打击
items.title_bilingual: “数以千万计的 Graviton 核心”：随着 Meta“购买”数十万个 CPU 和基础设施，AWS 取得了巨大的成功，证实了杰夫·贝佐斯的超大规模计算器是代理 AI 时代的重要支柱，这对 AMD 和英特尔的野心造成了重大打击 / 'Tens of millions of Graviton cores': AWS scores huge coup as Meta 'buys' hundreds of thousands of CPUs and infrastructure, confirming Jeff Bezos' hyperscaler as the essential backbone of the agentic AI Era in a major blow to AMD and Intel ambitions

items.title: 'The cost of cloud services and the cost of AI will also go down in the future, so we’ll try very hard to keep it for free': Coros' CEO on how the smartwatch maker is swerving subscriptions for now — avoiding another Garmin Connect+ disaster

把有意义的变量名换成随机字符，模型表现会显著下...

items.title:
有些游戏圈的朋友总是觉得，AI没办法做数值，好游戏不是靠这个，还要有玩法。

那什么时候才能分享呢？AI 能做所有的事？一句话让 AI 做个 3A？

items.title_en: The persistent notion that AI disruption could create a permanent underclass signals how much collateral damage AI companies might tolerate in pursuit of AGI (Jasmine Sun/New York Times)
items.title_zh: 人们一直认为人工智能的颠覆可能会造成永久的下层阶级，这表明人工智能公司在追求通用人工智能的过程中可能会承受多大的附带损害（Jasmine Sun/纽约时报）
